claimText: Operation Dronagiri is a pilot project implemented by the Geospatial Innovation Cell under the Department of Science and Technology.
evidenceExcerpt: Operation Dronagiri is a pilot project under the National Geospatial Policy 2022, implemented by the Geospatial Innovation Cell, Department of Science and Technology.
examUse: Statement-based question on the implementing agency of Operation Dronagiri.
distractorHooks: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)

claimText: The Survey of India (SoI) is the nodal agency for the National Geospatial Policy 2022.
evidenceExcerpt: Survey of India (SoI) is the nodal agency for the National Geospatial Policy
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the nodal agency for the National Geospatial Policy.

claimText: The Geospatial Data Promotion and Development Committee is the apex body established under the National Geospatial Policy 2022.
evidenceExcerpt: The National Geospatial Policy 2022 establishes the Geospatial Data Promotion and Development Committee as the apex body.
examUse: Statement-based question on the governance structure of the National Geospatial Policy.

claimText: The Continuously Operating Reference Stations (CORS) Network was launched by the Survey of India (SoI).
evidenceExcerpt: Survey of India (SoI) is the nodal agency for the National Geospatial Policy and launched the Continuously Operating Reference Stations (CORS) Network.
examUse: Statement-based question on the agency responsible for launching the CORS Network.

claimText: The first phase of Operation Dronagiri is being implemented in Uttar Pradesh, Haryana, Assam, Andhra Pradesh, and Maharashtra.
evidenceExcerpt: The first phase of Operation Dronagiri is being implemented in UP, Haryana, Assam, Andhra Pradesh, and Maharashtra.
examUse: Statement-based question on the geographical coverage of the Operation Dronagiri pilot project.
distractorHooks: Implemented in Kerala, Tamil Nadu, and Karnataka
